description: Wednesday 28 August 2024 | Maori Affairs Committee Review briefing on the 2022/23 annual review of Te Taura Whiri I Te Reo Māori (Māori Language Commission) Hearing of evidence: Submitter List: Te Taura Whiri I Te Reo Māori - Professor Rawinia Higgins, Toihau/Chairperson - Ngahiwi Apanui-Barr, Tumu Whakahaere/Chief Executive - Tuehu Harris, Hautū/Deputy CE - Ngapera Hoerara, Hautū/Deputy CE - Te Tumatakuru O’Connell, Hautū/Deputy CE - Matu Ihaka, Hautū/Deputy CE - Pirimia Burger, Hautū/Deputy CE Briefing on Te Mātāwai Hearing of evidence Submiiter list: Te Mātāwai - Reikura Kahi- co-chair of Te Mātāwai - Haki Tuaupiki: Board member- Te Kāhui ā Rohe o ngā Iwi o Tainui - Paulette Tamati-Elliffe: Board member- Te Kāhui ā Rohe o ngā Iwi o Tainui - Poia Rewi: Tumu Whakarae- Tari o Te Mātāwai - Ria Tomoana: Kaitohutohu Matua- Tari o Te Mātāwai - Basil Keane: kaitohutohu rautraki, kaupapa here - Tari o Te Mātāwai - Ursula Featherston: Strategic Advisor (policy and strategy)- Tari o Te Mātāwai - Michelle Rikihana-Vieira: kaiwhakahaere Pāpāho- Tari o Te Mātāwai
